title: RE:Rotaria
description: Modpack for the Rotaria SMP fourth season!
body:
# RE:Rotaria
Re rotaria is the 4th seasons modpack for the Rotaria SMP. This time back with a bang. The modpack is primarly focused on create and its addons. For performance reasons the pack has been moved to NeoForge

The Rotaria experience is a Create+ Vanilla+ modpack made with the players of rotaria in mind. But will also give a complete and fun experience for anyone who wants to enjoy some time alone in singleplayer. 

Whats so special about RE:Rotaria?
Its made for automation and many hours of grinding OR a chill session of building. With a mix of performace, ambeince and immersion mods this will for sure satisfy any 2-week or 2-year phase.

Contents of the pack
🛠️ Create and addons, resulting in an endless rabbithole of items/hour
🗻 World generation to get lost in
🧩 Custom mods made with love, by the team at rotaria
🌐 Made to work for everyone, better performance, tps, and smoother gameplay
